_comment: 14:00 UTC = 09:00 EST = 06:00 PST. Daily. R1 (feature-pr84-r1-daemon-creds): the daemon's prepareCronPrompt now fetches open PRs, gates on zero PRs (replacing the retired bash wake-check), and injects a sanitized scalar payload — so there is no wakeCheck field and the agent holds no GH_TOKEN. maxConcurrent=1 prevents overlap if a slow run wedges past the next tick. systemd unit Environment=TZ=UTC (Plan 01a) locks tick interpretation regardless of VPS host timezone.
